title: RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: REDMOND RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term, high-intensity residential drug and alcohol treatment. 676 NE Maple Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 504-9577 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 504-9577 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, ASL by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - INPATIENT WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
